{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Fisher's hook
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Fisher's hook]] is a curved [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
